title: Shift symbols: ^ & * ( )
text: 2^3 = 8. a&b = and. 3*5 = 15. f(x) = y. (this) & (that) — both work great!
finger_focus: Left Shift held by pinky; right hand types 6-0 with own fingers

tips.text: Hold left Shift with left pinky, then type with right hand
Used in code: 2^3 (power), f(x) (function), if A&&B

character_tips.anna: Right-side Shift symbols — use LEFT Shift, right-hand digits.
character_tips.maxim: Parentheses ( ) are everywhere — math, code, English. Master them.
character_tips.klavochka: Brackets hug ideas — like a gentle embrace 🤗
